How Interesta Works

Three simple steps to go from scrolling alone to building your real-world circle.

STEP 01

Set Your Vibe

Pick your interests, availability, and the people you want to meet.

STEP 02

Discover Nearby

See relevant profiles and communities near your location instantly.

STEP 03

Meet For Real

Move from chat to real plans with safe, moderated interactions.
